name: NowMedia Loved Synup So Much They Added Social
short_description: NowMedia's partnership with Synup empowered them to scale and expand their offerings
client_challenge:
Frustrated by Meta Business Suite, NowMedia added social media management to their Synup package

NowMedia is a digital and social media marketing agency that specializes in dental and small business marketing. From Google Business Profiles to social media, they make it so it’s easy for SMBs of all kinds to take their business online.

‍

When they first started offering local SEO services, they updated their clients’ listings manually. While their clients were grateful, the team at NowMedia quickly realized that they couldn’t sustainably grow their business. To scale, they needed a local listings management platform that they could white-label and use for their clientele.

‍

Enter: Synup.

‍

As their agency expanded over the years, NowMedia’s clients began expressing interest in social media services, as well. With customers searching for dental services on Google and places like Facebook or Instagram, it seemed crucial to have some sort of social media presence.

‍

Without a dedicated social media manager in-house, NowMedia’s customers had to trust them with accurately representing their businesses online. With a niche like dental care, it’s no easy feat.
client_solution:
Synup helps NowMedia go above and beyond for their clients

Creating posts for the dentistry niche requires knowledge that the average person may not have. But with an expanding list of social media management clients, the NowMedia team had to learn - and fast!

‍

Armed with Synup Social, the team utilized AI-powered content generation tools to help supplement their dentistry knowledge. Now, they can:

  • Create dental health-specific content with one click
  • Deploy posts across platforms (with platform-specific edits)
  • Schedule posts in advance
  • House all of their client profiles in one dashboard 
  • Easily share analytics with clients 

‍

The team has seen great success, and the clients love it, too!
the_difference:
NowMedia can better manage clients’ local and social presence with better results

As an agency, partnerships can make or break your business. As NowMedia expands their services from local SEO to social media and beyond, they know that they can trust Synup to collaborate with them to produce great results for their clients.

‍

Thanks to Synup:

  • Social media engagement is up 42%
  • Churn is down 16%
  • Phone calls are up 52%

‍

By getting better outcomes for clients, NowMedia has found more success, allowing the business to scale and help more SMBs take their businesses online!

seo.title: NowMedia Loved Synup So Much They Added Social
